title: Pulling Guard
description:
In these artist's concepts of the Pulling Guard program, an overwatch drone is provides enhanced situational awareness and threat detection while a remotely-operated, tow-behind surface vessel is provides protection from incoming pirate vessels.

The armed, remotely-operated, tow-behind surface vessel engages an incoming pirate vessel to protect an unarmed ship.
text:
Details
January 2025
In these artist's concepts:
An overwatch drone is providing enhanced situational awareness and threat detection for an unarmed cargo ship. The Pulling Guard armed, remotely-operated, tow-behind surface vessel is providing protection from incoming pirate vessels.
The armed, remotely-operated, tow-behind surface vessel engages an incoming pirate vessel to protect an unarmed ship.
